author: François Chalifour
subject: v3.0.0-beta.0
body: # [3.0.0-beta.0](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.10.3...v3.0.0-beta.0) (2018-12-10) ### Bug Fixes * **api:** remove transformData
